main.description: Re-route reports within an ID range to matching queues based on current queue configuration.

endReportId.description: End of report ID range (inclusive). Difference between start and end must be less than 5,000.

assigned.description: The number of reports assigned to a queue.

unmatched.description: The number of reports with no matching queue.

errors.name: OutOfRange
errors.description: The request is invalid, such as missing required fields or invalid field values.
